messages.revalidationFailed: Weryfikacja nie powiodła się. Sprawdź urządzenie pamięci i spróbuj ponownie.
messages.revalidationStillMissing: Weryfikacja zakończona, ale {{version}} wciąż jest niedostępne. Upewnij się, że {{path}} jest dostępne przed ponowną próbą.
messages.revalidationStillMissingNoPath: Weryfikacja zakończona, ale {{version}} wciąż jest niedostępne. Upewnij się, że urządzenie pamięci jest zamontowane przed ponowną próbą.
messages.unavailableHintWithReinstall: The editor path is not accessible. Mount the storage device and retry, reinstall the editor, or remove this entry.
messages.reinstallFailed: Reinstall failed. Check your connection and try again.
messages.unavailableCustomEditorHint: The custom editor path is not accessible. Mount the storage device and retry, or remove this entry.

replace.title: Replace custom editor?
replace.message: A custom editor with this version is already registered.
replace.detail: Replacing it will update the launcher record to use the selected manifest. Your editor files will not be deleted.

drop.title: Drop manifest to add custom editor

creator.title: Create Custom Editor Manifest
creator.description: Create a manifest file for a custom Godot editor and register it immediately.

outputDirectory.label: Output folder
outputDirectory.help: Folder where godotlauncher-editor-manifest.json will be written.

name.label: Display name
name.help: Name shown in Godot Launcher for this custom editor.

version.label: Manifest version
version.help: Unique version identifier for this custom editor.

baseVersion.label: Base version
baseVersion.help: Godot compatibility version in major.minor format.

flavor.label: Flavor
flavor.help: Use gdscript for standard builds or dotnet for .NET builds. Custom values are allowed.

prerelease.label: Prerelease
prerelease.help: Mark this editor as a prerelease build.

platform.label: Platform
platform.help: Operating system this manifest entry supports.

arch.label: Architecture
arch.help: CPU architecture this editor supports. Universal works on any architecture for the selected platform.

editorPath.label: Editor path
editorPath.help: Path to the custom Godot editor executable or app bundle.

consolePath.label: Console path
consolePath.help: Optional path to a console executable for this editor.

baseVersion.baseVersion: Base version must use major.minor format, for example 4.4.

validation.createFailed: Failed to create custom editor manifest.
